title: Kachijhuli Sporting Club
summary: Kachijhuli Sporting Club (Bengali: কাঁচিঝুলি স্পোর্টিং ক্লাব) was a professional Bangladeshi Women's association football club from Mymensingh. The club was founded in 2021 and last played in the Bangladesh Women's Football League.
text:
Kachijhuli Sporting Club (Bengali: কাঁচিঝুলি স্পোর্টিং ক্লাব) was a professional Bangladeshi Women's association football club from Mymensingh. The club was founded in 2021 and last played in the Bangladesh Women's Football League.

History
The club was established on 20 March 2021, ahead of the 2020–21 Bangladesh Women's Football League. In second  phase of the league, the club was expelled due to abandoning three matches.
